manifest.prompt: mrcolor_panel_style, full color manga panel, clean webtoon coloring, manhwa panel art, character panel, close-up panel, action panel, single panel

notes: The QwenVL training CLI required local package import hardening because a site-package named training can shadow the repository training directory when the script is invoked directly.
The checkpoint is a local ignored artifact because .gitignore excludes checkpoints/*qwenvl*.safetensors.
This experiment proves bounded training and checkpoint compatibility, not final reference-control generation quality.
next: Install or expose the c053 checkpoint to ComfyUI and run a c035-style single-character generation/contact-sheet gate.
